# CWE-209 negative: generic client error without internals
lang: go
file: CWE-209-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"database/sql"
	"log"
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

// CWE-209 Generation of Error Message Containing Sensitive Information (mitigated)
func CreateOrder(c *gin.Context, db *sql.DB) {
	id := c.PostForm("id")
	_, err := db.Exec("INSERT INTO orders(id) VALUES(?)", id)
	if err != nil {
		log.Printf("order insert failed: %v", err)
		c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": "could not create order"})
		return
	}
	c.JSON(http.StatusCreated, gin.H{"status": "created"})
}
